layer: verification-only; decision-layer awaits S2b error budget

crit.APRIME: all 3 operator orders in [1.7,2.3] AND N=200 err < 1e-3
crit.MMS: solver MMS: Ewin fitted order in [1.6,2.4] AND finest |err| < 1e-3 AND source self-checks pass
crit.COAX_E: Celik p in [1.6,2.4] AND asym in [0.85,1.15] AND finest |signed err| < 1.5e-4 AND GCI covers truth
crit.BI8: TRUE-error criterion only: finest |signed err| < 2e-5; GCI formally withdrawn for this functional
crit.AMP: smoothed channel authoritative: finest |signed err| < 1e-4 (OFF = sentinel)
crit.POINT: 15 fixed probes, smoothed: finest max |signed err| < 2.5e-3
crit.LOOPDOM: finest-mesh domain plateau: max rel delta (R 0.14->0.20) < 1e-3 on Phi AND |B|
crit.SOLVER: tolerance-sweep deltas < 10 percent of finest mesh error per observable
crit.REF: independent 25-digit references agree with integral2 refs < 1e-9 (measured 6e-13, cloud QC 2026-07-24)
crit.PROV: manifest: 100 percent of run artifacts + sources + femm.exe hashed (SHA-256, full)
